case_title: ADAM B. RICHMOND VS. RONALD A. UTLEY

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHMOND, ADAM B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UTLEY, RONALD A. $1,003.17 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,083.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,003.17 FILED BY RICHMOND, ADAM B. AS TO DEFENDANT UTLEY, RONALD A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED JUL-14-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UTLEY, RONALD A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-21-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-21-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. CLAIM MAILED 1 MONTH AFTER SUBSERVICE WAS DONE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2011 - JUDGMENT.
